title: Path Scale FAIL: falsifier with wrong G_sequence value and wrong final ratio
_primary_source_note: Intentional falsifier for validator testing (not a new claim), same generator paths as the PASS fixtures grounded in Pell equation theory (Barning, 1963); silver ratio continued fractions (Hardy and Wright, 2008).
_fixture_purpose: Falsifier: declares a wrong G_sequence value at step 3 of the UNIFORM_B path (should trip SC_2), and a wrong declared final ratio that is not within 0.01 of 3+2sqrt(2) (should trip SC_CONV_B and SC_RATIO).

paths.pell_limit_note: FALSIFIER: G_sequence[3] declared 999, should be 985; final ratio declared 5.9999, should converge to 5.8284

paths.note: UNIFORM_A: correct, kept valid so this fixture isolates the defect to the first path
UNIFORM_C: correct, kept valid so this fixture isolates the defect to the first path

validation_checks.description: G monotone increasing in all paths
FALSIFIER: declared ratios don't match computed
FALSIFIER: declared final ratio 5.9999 not within 0.01 of 5.8284

fail_ledger: SC_2: path[0] G_sequence mismatch at index 3: declared 999, computed 985
SC_RATIO: path[0] declared ratios don't match recomputed ratios
SC_CONV_B: path[0] final ratio not within 0.01 of 3+2sqrt(2)
